message:
fix(grpc): move init_test after fn definitions, allow clippy::unnecessary_wraps in decompressor test

Reorder test_framed_codec_custom_decompressor_enforces_size to define the
passthrough_compress and expanding_decompress closures before calling
init_test(), since the test initialization should happen after all helpers
are defined. Add #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_wraps)] to suppress the lint
on the test function whose inner closures return Result for API conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
